form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation sat on the pace when 3rd of 13 at Townsville Bm65 on January 6 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Singular carrying 59kg at $4.80. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 9 at Townsville Cl3 on January 18 2025 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Booming Lad carrying 61kg at $4.80. Trialled on March 31 at Townsville over 850m and finished fourth. Can get the job done.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in passing the 200m and had to be corrected.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming didn't finish the race at Townsville Cl3-Sw February 27 over 1000m. Second-up 4th of 8 at Cairns Bm55 on March 26 over 950m, on heavy track; 3.5 len behind Threebrothers carrying 59.5kg at $12. Other runners rate better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping contacting the hindquarters of Prideofthebigfish.
Began awkwardly; hung out under pressure over the final 200m.
Crowded for a short distance shortly after leaving the barriers.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run gave a sight but was run down late 2nd in a small field at Emerald Bm50 on April 4 over 1000m, long-neck behind High Security carrying 61.5kg at $4.80. The race before that 2nd of 11 at Mackay 0 - 55 on March 19 over 1050m, slow going 0.6 len behind Rum Rumble carrying 57.5kg at $13. One of the better chances.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Hung inwards when placed under pressure in the home straight.
Jumped away very awkwardly.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming didn't finish the race at Townsville Cl3-Sw February 27 over 1000m. Second run from a spell raced on the pace before fading second last of 11 at Townsville Bm60 on March 15 over 1200m, on a wet track; 4.5 len behind Impressionism with 59.5kg at $5.50. Can improve. Better than that and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 900m, had to be restrained to avoid the heels of Nagamie.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Cairns Bm60 November 25 over 1400m, 5 len behind Kickagoal Kenny with 58kg at $11. First up last campaign second of 8 at Goulburn Bm66 May 8 over 1300m, soft track; 0.9 len behind Chop The Ice with 55kg at $10. In the mix on best form.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation third of 7 at Ewan 0 - 60 October 19 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Room For Squares with 59kg at $2.50. When resuming last campaign fourth of 14 at Townsville 0 - 55 July 19 over 1200m, 3 len behind Golden Octavian carrying 57kg at $4.80. Others have firmer winning claims.

First up last campaign fifth of 8 at Beaudesert 0 - 60 December 31 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Blakemore Avenue carrying 60kg at $6. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up ran last of 8 at Moranbah Hcp on March 28 over 1000m, 17 len behind Soopat carrying 55kg at $8. Second-up got back early in a small field at Cairns Hcp on April 4 over 950m, on rain affected going; 10 len behind Valenki with 54kg at $18. Hard to have in this company.
